channel.title: Ente Community Discord digest
channel.description: AI-generated daily recap of activity in the Ente Community Discord server

item.title: Ente Community Discord Jul 23, 2026 - 17 messages in 5 channels
item.description:
Activity was light, with 17 messages across five channels. Most discussion centered on RSS discovery and filtering in #off-topic, alongside brief technical chatter about self-hosting, Scaleway, and Ente Auth.

#off-topic

Nine messages from six participants covered Windows VPN privacy, browser preferences, RSS feeds and aggregators, noisy content filtering, and whether Ente accepts UI or feature contributions. One discussion shared a Windows Latest article.

#photos

Three messages from one participant praised self-hosting while reacting to a possible Scaleway outage and “OOMs.”

#memes

Three participants shared two meme attachments, along with a reminder to keep language appropriate for under-18 members.

#introduce-yourself

One brief greeting was posted.

#auth

A user asked whether Ente Auth works with the macOS Alfred app.
